name: PrimeReact
description: The Most Complete React UI Suite with 90+ components, enterprise support, and multiple design system themes

description.value: The Most Complete React UI Suite with 90+ components, enterprise support, and multiple design system themes

active-maintenance.comment: Very active; latest v10.9.7 released August 2025; 11,319 commits; 347 contributors

framework.comment: Built specifically for React; part of PrimeTek's multi-framework suite (PrimeVue, PrimeNG, PrimeFaces)

styling-approach.comment: Offers styled mode with SCSS themes and unstyled mode for custom styling including Tailwind; CSS variables for dynamic theming

component-model.comment: Offers both styled mode (pre-skinned with Material, Bootstrap, PrimeOne themes) and unstyled mode for complete customization

typescript.comment: Full TypeScript support with type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: First class support for SSR and Next.js; official website built with Next.js; example projects available

rsc-compatible.comment: RSC compatibility not explicitly documented; SSR supported but RSC status unclear

design-system.comment: Design-agnostic with 40+ pre-built themes including Material Design, Bootstrap, Lara, Soho, Viva, Arya variants

dark-mode.comment: Multiple dark theme variants available (Bootstrap4 Dark, Material Dark, Lara Dark, Soho Dark, Viva Dark, Arya Dark)

theming-system.comment: Customizable via SCSS variables in primereact-sass-theme project; dynamic theme switching via changeTheme() in PrimeReactContext

css-variables.comment: Themes export CSS variables for dynamic styling; refer to Colors page for details

design-tokens.comment: Core structure separated from theme; SCSS variables folder contains adjustable theming parameters

rtl-support.comment: RTL not fully supported; GitHub issue #3096 tracks this request; developers need custom CSS overrides with [dir='rtl'] selector

component-count.comment: 90+ components; some sources cite 80+ as base count

text-input.comment: InputText component with filled variant, small/large sizes, FloatLabel support

select.comment: Dropdown component with filtering, showClear, overlay options

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect component with filtering, chips display, virtualized scrolling for large datasets

combobox.comment: AutoComplete component provides searchable/filterable select with autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with TriStateCheckbox for three-state selection

radio.comment: RadioButton component for radio button groups

slider.comment: Slider component with single or dual-thumb (range) support

number-input.comment: InputNumber component with increment/decrement, currency, locale support

tag-input.comment: Chips component for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove

pin-input.comment: InputOtp component for OTP/PIN input; configurable length (default 4), masking, integer-only mode

color-picker.comment: ColorPicker component with full picker UI

date-picker.comment: Calendar component with customizable format, multiple selection modes, month/year views

time-picker.comment: Calendar with showTime prop for time selection; supports 12/24 hour format; timeOnly mode available

date-range-picker.comment: Calendar supports range selection via selectionMode='range'

file-upload.comment: FileUpload component with preview, auto/advanced modes, multiple file support

input-groups.comment: InputGroup component for combining inputs with addons (icons, buttons, text)

button-groups.comment: Button groups and SelectButton for segmented controls

split-button.comment: SplitButton component for button with dropdown for secondary actions

data-table.comment: DataTable with sorting, filtering, pagination, virtual scrolling (100K+ records), row/cell selection, inline editing, column resizing, frozen rows/columns, export to CSV/PDF/XLS

virtual-infinite-list.comment: VirtualScroller component for large datasets; integrated with DataTable and other components

tree-view.comment: Tree and TreeTable components with lazy loading, selection, filtering

list-view.comment: ListBox, OrderList, PickList, DataView components for styled lists

avatar.comment: Avatar component with various sizes and shapes; AvatarGroup for grouping

badge.comment: Badge component for status indicators; OverlayBadge for overlays

tag-chip-pill.comment: Chip and Tag components; removable, with images/labels

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical timeline of events

calendar.comment: Calendar component with inline mode for month/week view display (not just picker)

alert.comment: Message and InlineMessage components for static alerts

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with programmatic control; positions, life duration, custom templates

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar component with determinate and indeterminate modes

progress-circle.comment: Knob component is an input dial, not a progress indicator; no dedicated circular progress component

spinner-loader.comment: ProgressSpinner component for indeterminate loading states

skeleton.comment: Skeleton component for content placeholders during loading

empty-state.comment: Empty state templates supported in DataTable and other components

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and ConfirmDialog components; draggable, resizable, maximizable options

popover.comment: OverlayPanel component for floating content anchored to trigger; ConfirmPopup for confirmation

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hints; multiple positions, custom content

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component with overlay mode; TieredMenu for hierarchical menus

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; could be built using Dialog + AutoComplete

tabs.comment: TabView and TabMenu components for tab-based content switching

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb component for hierarchical path navigation

pagination.comment: Paginator component with customizable template, rows per page dropdown

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Menubar, MegaMenu (horizontal/vertical), TieredMenu, PanelMenu, SlideMenu components

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component; PanelMenu for collapsible sidebar navigation

bottom-navigation.comment: TabMenu can be styled for mobile bottom nav; Dock component available for macOS-style dock

grid.comment: No dedicated Grid layout component; PrimeFlex utility library provides grid classes

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component; use PrimeFlex utility classes for flex layouts

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; use PrimeFlex utility classes

divider.comment: Divider component with horizontal/vertical layout support

collapsible.comment: Accordion, Panel, Fieldset components provide collapsible sections

resizable.comment: Splitter component for user-resizable panels; Dialog supports resizable option

splitter.comment: Splitter component with horizontal/vertical layout, nested splitters

rich-text-editors.comment: Official Editor component based on Quill; requires Quill as dependency; customizable toolbar via headerTemplate

chart-libraries.comment: Chart component built on Chart.js; supports pie, doughnut, bar, line, radar, polar area, combo charts

form-libraries.comment: Official documentation and examples for React Hook Form, Formik, and React Final Form integration

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animation support via Ripple directive and component transitions; CSSTransition utilities

icon-libraries.comment: PrimeIcons library included (200+ icons); also available on Figma; FontAwesome and other icon libraries can be used

date-libraries.comment: Calendar has built-in date handling; locale support; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; uses semantic HTML with hidden native form elements for accessibility

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support; native form controls used for inherent keyboard accessibility

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader compatibility emphasized; mentions NVDA, JAWS, ChromeVox; components designed to work with screen readers

focus-management.comment: Focus mechanisms through native HTML elements; tabIndex support for focusable elements

wcag-level.comment: WCAG 2.0 compliant; comprehensive accessibility work from PrimeVue/PrimeNG being ported (as of Q4 2023)

accessibility-rating.comment: Good accessibility with WCAG 2.0 compliance, ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, screen reader testing; accessibility improvements ongoing

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle size not reliably measurable due to optional dependencies; tree-shakeable via individual component imports

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable - import components individually (e.g., 'primereact/button') for optimal bundle size

tree-shakeable.comment: Components imported individually to minimize bundle size; ESM bundle available

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be loaded on demand; VirtualScroller and Tree support lazy data loading

documentation-quality.comment: Good comprehensive documentation with API reference, code examples, accessibility docs; form library integration examples; some TypeScript documentation could be improved

interactive-docs.comment: Live component examples on documentation site

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; interactive examples integrated directly in docs

figma-kit.comment: PrimeReact Figma UI Kit available on Figma Community; PrimeIcons also available on Figma

cli-generator.comment: No dedicated CLI; example projects for Create React App, Next.js, Vite, and Refine available on GitHub

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 196,000 weekly downloads as of December 2025; PrimeTek libraries total 150M+ downloads

commercial-support.comment: PrimeReact PRO offers enterprise support with response within one business day, enhancement requests available

style-override.comment: Override via className, CSS variables, inline style prop; scoped styling with CSS Modules or CSS-in-JS; custom templates via props

compound-components.comment: Pattern used in Accordion (AccordionTab), Splitter (SplitterPanel), Menu components

render-props.comment: Template properties for customization (body templates, header templates, item templates)

slots.comment: Template props serve as slots for content injection; header, footer, item templates throughout

unstyled-mode.comment: Full unstyled mode available via unstyled: true in PrimeReactProvider; enables complete design control with Tailwind or custom CSS
